reviews.name: Rajiv Sharma
reviews.text: Gulshan showed exceptional curiosity and discipline during his internship. He quickly adapted to our industrial environment and asked the right questions — a rare quality in someone so early in their career.

reviews.name: Priya Nair
reviews.text: In just one month, Gulshan demonstrated a strong grasp of transformer assembly and electrical troubleshooting. He was methodical, safety-conscious, and always willing to understand the why behind each process.

reviews.name: Amit Verma
reviews.text: Worked with Gulshan on a Python automation project. His bot development skills and API integration knowledge are solid. He delivers clean, readable code and communicates very clearly throughout.

reviews.name: Sneha Kapoor
reviews.text: Gulshan is one of the most self-driven students I've worked with. He brings real-world internship experience into classroom discussions — his combination of hardware and software skills is genuinely rare.
